mapper.sql: br.id, br.elder_id elderId, e.name elderName, br.behavior_type behaviorType, br.behavior_name behaviorName, br.location, br.start_time startTime, br.end_time endTime, br.duration_minutes durationMinutes, br.risk_level riskLevel, br.source_device sourceDevice, br.remark, br.create_date createDate, br.update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_behavior_record br left join t_elder e on br.elder_id = e.id where br.id = #{id}

select
from t_behavior_record br left join t_elder e on br.elder_id = e.id where br.elder_id = #{elderId} and date(br.start_time) = date(#{reportDate}) order by br.start_time asc, br.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into t_behavior_record (elder_id, behavior_type, behavior_name, location, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, risk_level, source_device, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{elderId}, #{behaviorType}, #{behaviorName}, #{location}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{riskLevel}, #{sourceDevice}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_behavior_record set elder_id = #{elderId}, behavior_type = #{behaviorType}, behavior_name = #{behaviorName}, location = #{location}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, source_device = #{sourceDevice}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
